basicDetails.schemeName: Saraswati Vidya Yojana: Free Distribution of Bicycles - DNH&DD

state.label: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: “Free Distribution of Bicycles'' under the “Saraswati Vidya Yojana”has been implemented by the Directorate of Education, U.T. Administration Of DNH & DD. Under this scheme, bicycles are provided free of cost to all the girl students, studying in class VIII(8) each year in the Govt. schools of the U.T. Administration. > **Objective of the "Saraswati Vidya Yojana”:** The UT Administration of Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu has revised “Saraswati Vidya Yojana” on 23rd April, 2026, for the girl students of UT of Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu. The scheme aims to encourage girl students to continue education keeping in view the aim of:- “Beti Bachao Beti Padhao”. > **Objective of the "Free Distribution of Bicycles" Sub-scheme:** The objective of the scheme is to retain the girl students at Secondary & Higher Secondary stage and thereby decreasing the Dropout of the girl students by providing Bicycles to the girl students of class VIII to commute to school.
schemeContent.benefits_md: - The girl students of class VIII of Government Schools of this UT will be provided bicycle for free.
schemeContent.exclusions_md: - The girl students once availed the benefit will not be provided with the same in any of the subsequent year.
schemeContent.briefDescription: “Free Distribution of Bicycles'' under “Saraswati Vidya Yojana”, implemented by the Directorate of Education, U.T. Administration Of DNH & DD, aims to provide bicycles free of cost to all the girl students, studying in class VIII(8) in the Govt. schools.

children.text: “Free Distribution of Bicycles'' under the “Saraswati Vidya Yojana”has been implemented by the Directorate of Education, U.T. Administration Of DNH & DD. Under this scheme, bicycles are provided free of cost to all the girl students, studying in class VIII(8) each year in the Govt. schools of the U.T. Administration.
Objective of the "Saraswati Vidya Yojana”:

The UT Administration of Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu has revised “Saraswati Vidya Yojana”  on 23rd April, 2026, for the girl students of UT of Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu. The scheme aims to encourage girl students to continue education keeping in view the aim of:- “Beti Bachao Beti Padhao”.
Objective of the "Free Distribution of Bicycles" Sub-scheme:

The objective of the scheme is to retain the girl students at Secondary & Higher Secondary stage and thereby decreasing the Dropout of the girl students by providing Bicycles to the girl students of class VIII to commute to school.
The girl students of class VIII of Government Schools of this UT will be provided bicycle for free.
The girl students once availed the benefit will not be provided with the same in any of the subsequent year.
1.	The concerned Head of the school shall provide the enrolment of Girls student in Std. VIII in respective Government Schools to the respective District Education Office.
Note:
The girl student does not required to make any application individually.
2.	Bicycles will be provided to the girl student at the time of commencement of the New Academic Year as per the enrollment provided by the Head of the schools.
Contact for Grievance Redressal:

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. The applicant should be a girl. 1. The applicant should be a student. 1. The applicant should be studying in class VIII(8) in Government School of the UT of Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu.

children.text: The applicant should be a girl.
The applicant should be a student.
The applicant should be studying in class VIII(8) in Government School of the UT of Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu.
